title: Trachonitis #5139
definition:
Trachonitis = "a rugged region"

 1) a rough region, inhabited by robbers, situated between Antilibanus
    on the west and on the east by the mountains of Batanaea and on
    the north by the territory of Damascus
nasbUsage:

 1) a rough region, inhabited by robbers, situated between Antilibanus
